title: Create Automations
description: Lots of QOL recipes for the Create mod.
body:
# Create Automations

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e33f98a9871a644357db7dc7f70885616b849bc1_0.webp)

## Overview
Create Automations is a datapack that adds quite a few quality of life recipes to the Create mod. 
_Create Automations is updated for version 6.0 of the Create mod._

Currently, this datapack has been migrated over to modrinth and is an updated version of the datapack seen on Curseforge. [(Create Automations)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-automations) As of now, I have no plans on updating the Curseforge version. However, if the community would like me to update it, I can. 

## What Does It Add?
The recipes that are added with this datapack are recipes that seem to be missing from the Create mod and should help with automating items you could not before. I tried very hard to tweak these recipes to feel more like they belong in the Create mod.

_Note that the diamond and netherite recipes are 6.25% chances to not break the balance of gameplay._

I would also suggest installing JEI to see the exact percentages for other recipes as well.
